fsymId.description: Requested Identifier. Must be a valid Benchmark Identifier recognized by FactSet.

date.description: The respective date for values as of the date requested in YYYY-MM-DD format.

constituentNumber.description: The total number of constituents as of the date requested.

currency.description: Currency Code used in adjustments. If no Currency was requested, the service will default to the local Calendar.

marketValue.description: Index Level Market Capitalization as of the date requested expressed in millions.

priceReturnPercent1D.description: Index Level Price - 1 Day percent change

priceReturnPercentQTD.description: Index Level Price - Quarter-to-Date percent change

priceReturnPercentYTD.description: Index Level Price - Year-to-Date percent change

totalReturnLevel.description: Index Level Total Return Amount. (Gross or Net depends on requested returnType)

totalReturnPercent1D.description: Index Level Total Return - 1 Day percent change. (Gross or Net depends on requested returnType)

totalReturnPercentQTD.description: Index Level Total Return - Quarter-to-Date percent change. (Gross or Net depends on requested returnType)

totalReturnPercentYTD.description: Index Level Total Return - Year-to-Date percent change. (Gross or Net depends on requested returnType)

returnType.description: The requested Return Type - GROSS or NET

requestId.description: Benchmark Identifier specified in the request
